# edgecenter_dbaas_user (Resource)

Represent DBaaS database user resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "edgecenter" {
  permanent_api_token = "251$d3361.............1b35f26d8"
}

resource "edgecenter_dbaas_user" "example" {
  cluster_id = "080bbca5-1234-1234-1234-0bccd6f8f1b0"
  project_id = 1
  region_id  = 1
  name       = "my_user"
  password   = "SecurePassword123!"
  databases  = ["my_database"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)

### Optional

- `databases` (List of String)
- `project_id` (Number)
- `project_name` (String)
- `region_id` (Number)
- `region_name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
